description: A visitor at a zoo needs to leave temporarily to get something from their car and wants to ensure they can get back in.

nodes.task_description: Explain the re-entry policy to the visitor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent informs the visitor that re-entry is allowed on the same day.

nodes.task_description: Provide the visitor with a hand stamp or re-entry pass.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gives the visitor the necessary credential for re-entry.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the visitor on which entrance to use when they return.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear instructions for re-entry.
